# GlutenFreePlace

> Find verified gluten-free and celiac-safe restaurants, bakeries, and cafes in 156+ countries, with real reviews from gluten-free travelers.

GlutenFreePlace helps people with celiac disease and gluten intolerance discover safe places to eat worldwide. Each listing includes a celiac safety score, menu type (fully GF vs mixed kitchen), verified contact info, photos, and community reviews.

## Countries

- [Italy](/italy): Gluten-free restaurants across Italy (AIC certified spots highlighted).
- [Spain](/spain): GF dining in Spain, including FACE-certified venues.
- [France](/france): Dedicated GF bakeries and celiac-aware bistros across France.
- [United Kingdom](/gluten-free/united-kingdom): GF restaurants in the UK.
- [Ireland](/ireland): Celiac-safe spots across Ireland.
- [Germany](/germany): GF dining in Germany.
- [Sweden](/sweden): GF restaurants in Sweden.
- [USA](/usa): Gluten-free restaurants across the United States.
- [Canada](/gluten-free/canada): GF dining in Canada.
- [Argentina](/argentina): Celiac-safe restaurants in Argentina.
- [Japan](/japan): GF dining in Japan.
- [Thailand](/thailand): Naturally GF and celiac-aware Thai dining.
- [Australia](/australia): GF restaurants across Australia.
- [New Zealand](/new-zealand): Celiac-safe dining in New Zealand.
- [South Africa](/gluten-free/south-africa): GF spots across South Africa.
- [Kenya](/gluten-free/kenya): Celiac-safe dining in Kenya.
- [Nigeria](/gluten-free/nigeria): GF restaurants in Nigeria.
- [Morocco](/gluten-free/morocco): GF dining in Morocco.
- [Egypt](/gluten-free/egypt): Celiac-safe restaurants in Egypt.
- [Mauritius](/gluten-free/mauritius): GF dining across Mauritius.
- [Botswana](/botswana): GF restaurants in Botswana.
